title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Cushman & Wakefield India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Cushman & Wakefield India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
